title: Creamy Festive Butternut Squash Stir-fry
description: A peppery and creamy festive argentinian dish featuring butternut squash, baked in a paleo-friendly twist.
instructions: Cut butternut squash into thin slices, brush with olive oil and season with salt.
In a skillet, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add minced garlic and sauté for about 1 minute.
Add chicken fillets to the skillet, skin side down, cook until golden brown (about 4-5 minutes). Remove from pan and set aside.
Drain excess water from butternut squash slices, arrange in a baking dish. Add zucchini and bell peppers over them.
Pour coconut milk over all ingredients, then add lemon juice and paprika. Bake for about 20-25 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
Stir in Cayenne Pepper if desired. Return chicken fillets to the pan with vegetables, toss gently to combine, adding extra paprika if needed.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course.
